affine_equation: No affine authority is consumed or emitted.
failure_equation: No successor name on failed acquisition or relayout.
checking: Nominal freshness and dominance only.

affine_equation: No affine authority is consumed or emitted.
failure_equation: Failed arithmetic emits no place.
checking: Canonical checked interval projection.

affine_equation: No affine authority is consumed or emitted.
failure_equation: Unknown overlap or incomplete cover emits no footprint.
checking: Canonical sorted exact-cover check.

affine_equation: One input root, release escrow, and whole partition become exactly one matching output of each kind under fresh lambda.
failure_equation: Precommit failure returns the exact predecessor triple and old lambda.
checking: Whole-cover, empty-obligation, and one-to-one lineage equations.

affine_equation: The output partition is only a unique affine packaging of every supplied leaf; no leaf remains separately live.
failure_equation: Incomplete or overlapping seal returns every input unchanged and emits no partition.
checking: Exact cover plus affine multiset equality.

affine_equation: Product/sum/span preserve one partition; detach maps one parent leaf to one Out plus one Subowner; join consumes exactly the matching pair into one partition.
failure_equation: Failed detach/join returns the exact predecessor side with no extra fragment.
checking: Branch-specific detach/join multiset equations.

affine_equation: Initial seal consumes one complete partition; successor consumes one classifier; selection borrows the classifier and creates only a scoped view.
failure_equation: Decoder failure preserves the borrowed classifier and emits no RoleView.
checking: Finite role-table plus branch-specific seal/successor/selection equations.

affine_equation: Empty seal consumes a partition; push consumes chain plus exact node; pop returns one exact node plus tail; selection creates only a scoped view.
failure_equation: Empty pop or failed selection preserves the exact prior chain.
checking: Nil/push/pop/splice branch equations and unique-node affine checks.

affine_equation: One existing source escrows incompatible authority and emits one fixed scoped loan; it does not copy the underlying owner.
failure_equation: Compatibility or scope failure emits no loan and preserves the source.
checking: Scoped CFG and interval-conflict equation.

affine_equation: Known stable sealing consumes one complete state; every later control output consumes the complete predecessor lineage and exact carried multiset.
failure_equation: Every failure arm returns the named predecessor, Repair, Poison, or exact disposition multiset.
checking: Finite outcome and authority-multiset equations.

affine_equation: Packing consumes the exact environment and obligations into one reusable shared seal or one affine Once; no capture remains independently live.
failure_equation: Packing or explicit box allocation failure returns the unchanged environment and obligations.
checking: Capture, effect, gate, signature, layout, and multiplicity equations.

affine_equation: Domain sealing consumes the complete registry state; ingress sealing only repackages the already-complete affine ingress set.
failure_equation: Incomplete registry, ingress cover, or profile returns every predecessor and emits no new domain.
checking: Finite lane/profile validation and exact structural-cover equations.

affine_equation: Facts are copyable projections that consume and duplicate no safety authority.
failure_equation: Projection failure emits no fact and preserves all safety inputs.
checking: Closed producer table and computed dependency/invalidator sets.

affine_equation: Each opcode has a separate one-to-one owner permutation; outputs listed together here are alternatives, never simultaneous copies, and every live lineage is consumed, moved, returned, destroyed, or escrowed once.
failure_equation: Precommit failure returns every offered owner and exact predecessor; partial completion emits only its enumerated Transit equation.
checking: Opcode-specific branch multiset table; no union-map acceptance without matching one branch.

affine_equation: Begin emits one scoped loan while escrowing its source; reborrow narrows one loan; end consumes it and restores the retained parent lineage.
failure_equation: Compatibility failure emits no loan; scope end has no outstanding child loan.
checking: Scoped CFG branch equations.

affine_equation: Each exact outcome consumes the entire predecessor multiset and emits one enumerated successor arm; the union map is not an authority rule by itself.
failure_equation: Recoverable, Repair, Poison, and terminal arms preserve exactly their declared resources; wildcard restoration is impossible.
checking: Finite branch table and exact multiset equality.

affine_equation: Conversion consumes one existing owner/retired lineage; each returning structural step removes one exact source obligation before its terminal action.
failure_equation: Failure returns the unchanged obligation or one exact smaller source plus remaining action.
checking: Closed source/action branch equations and decreasing measure.

affine_equation: Transfer moves one package; invoke consumes the package before call and maps its captured obligations to one InFlight or declared normal-post lineage.
failure_equation: Pack/enqueue failure returns the unchanged package; normal call return must match one finite signature postcondition.
checking: Affine package CFG plus finite signature/effect equations.

affine_equation: Publication consumes owner lineage into PublishedCustody, Shared anchor, and the exact initial ingress set; later success transforms only the bound custody/ingress slot; outputs are exact branch alternatives.
failure_equation: Failed and retry arms return every offered owner, custody, ingress, and shared lineage unchanged.
checking: Target-profile opcode table plus exact success/failure branch equations; authority-changing event is consumed once.

affine_equation: Begin produces one scoped observation; role selection borrows Open ingress; retirement consumes PublishedCustody plus the complete all-Closed ingress set; Quiescent is a shared projection of a successful complete domain-generation validation and never consumes or owns another thread's observation token.
failure_equation: Open ingress, active old lane, incomplete/stalled registry, or ordering failure preserves inputs and emits neither Retired nor Quiescent.
checking: ClosedIngress and OBS-CLOSE finite premise equations plus structural-fold state.

affine_equation: Only sealed acquisition/read/write rows have true origins; all handle, control, and partial-event outputs preserve exact predecessor lineage, and authority-changing event entries are affine.
failure_equation: Every failure emits the row's exact or conservative successor; unknown external effect becomes Indeterminate rather than an invented predecessor or success.
checking: Compiler-owned profile row plus exact branch resource equation.

affine_equation: Projection consumes and duplicates no safety authority.
failure_equation: Failed projection emits no fact and keeps the runtime check.
checking: Closed producer table and computed dependency/invalidator sets.

affine_equation: One root, one release escrow, one reunited partition, and every required domain/quiescence premise are consumed; no authority-bearing output survives.
failure_equation: Failed external release follows its sealed exact/conservative leaf outcome and never emits reusable root authority unless the row explicitly retains ownership.
checking: Whole-cover, empty-obligation, matching-retired/quiescent, and terminal leaf equations.
